name: Peking University Resources (Holdings) Company Limited
summary: Peking University Resources (Holdings) Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, distributes information products, and invests in and develops properties in Mainland China and Hong Kong. The company primarily distributes servers, printers, switches, networking products, storage devices, workstations, optical screen products, video conference hosts, conference controllers, codec, UPS power supply products, and notebook computer of various manufacturers, such as HP, H3C, CommScope, Brocade, Microsoft, Corning, Lenovo, Huawei, DELL, IBM, Netgear, CommScope, and SGi. It also acts as a distribution channel for the products of other IT companies, such as LifeSize, BARCO, CommScope, Fujitsu, Samsung, Uniview, Corning, Brocade, Librestream, Ruckus, and Impinj. In addition, the company leases and subleases, and sells properties. The company was formerly known as EC-Founder (Holdings) Company Limited and changed its name to Peking University Resources (Holdings) Company Limited in December 2013. Peking University Resources (Holdings) Company Limited is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. Peking University Resources (Holdings) Company Limited is a subsidiary of Founder Information (Hong Kong) Limited.
